summary.shape_sentence: Gap-down liquidation at the bell, sharp opening washout, then a grinding two-way recovery that never fully repaired the early damage.

goat.note: Late-session reclaim burst off afternoon demand into the 25,215-25,225 area.

red_circles.behavior: Appeared on failed rebounds and lower highs, especially where price ran back into the descending supply ribbon.

green_circles.behavior: Clustered around defended lows and support retests, including the opening recovery base and later afternoon holds.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Primary supply sat around 25,210-25,260 with a higher shelf near 25,300; lower supply was tested but higher resistance held.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand formed first around 25,000-25,080, then rebuilt slightly higher; early demand broke, deeper afternoon demand held.

time_markers.10am_blue: Opening washout had already occurred and price was attempting to stabilize and reclaim from the low.
time_markers.12pm_red: Session was in a noisy recovery rotation beneath overhead supply after rebounding off the open.
time_markers.2pm_green: Afternoon trade remained weak-to-neutral, testing whether lower demand could absorb another sell leg.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Market closed during a late rebound, but still below the opening level and below the best recovery highs.

takeaway: Bearish opening-drive day that transitioned into a rotational recovery session, with early liquidation setting the key low and repeated supply caps preventing full reversal.
